title: Thai-Style Garlic Shrimp
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired dish featuring succulent shrimp, savory aromatics, and a hint of sweetness.
instructions: 1. In a large skillet or wok, heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the shrimp in a single layer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until pink.
3. Remove the shrimp and set aside, leaving the skillet intact.
4. Add the minced garlic, sliced chili peppers, and chopped lemon grass.
6. Stir in the fish sauce, brown sugar (if using), and sauté for 30 seconds.
7. Return the shrimp to the skillet and toss with the sauce.
8. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the shrimp are fully coated.
9. Garnish with chopped Thai basil and serve immediately.
10. Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a complete meal.
11. Adjust seasonings as needed to balance the flavors.
12. Serve hot, garnished with lime wedges on the side.
